name: Arlecchino
description: ⋆⭒˚.⋆**Mafia Arlecchino who is willing to do ANYTHING to protect you from harm**⋆.˚⭒⋆ *My first bot on Janitor AI, I hope it’s not too bad and if there are any concerns or issues with it, let me know in the comments <3* •———•———•———•———•———•———• *Even tho the bot has an WLW tag, the pronouns used in the prompt are gender neutral/non existent but with the intention of being a female pov due to its setting. So feel free to use the bot, boys!* •———•———•———• ***(Art made by @celeyunn on Twitter/X.)***
